name: Docs QA
description: Documentation QA pass that updates downstream docs after feature or workflow changes.
content:
Review the work completed in the current context and update affected downstream documentation.

This is a documentation QA pass. Its purpose is to keep docs aligned after feature, behavior, workflow, or implementation changes.

Check relevant downstream materials, including README files, specs, workflow docs, feature docs, decision docs, implementation notes, project cards or equivalent state files, and any other documentation affected by the change.

Requirements:
- Identify what changed.
- Identify which documents are outdated because of that change.
- Update those documents so they accurately reflect the current state.
- Flag anything ambiguous, conflicting, or missing.
- Prioritize correctness, consistency, and downstream coverage.
